name: weft
description: Find and pay for real-world APIs from your agent — Weft settles the per-call x402/MPP micropayment inside your spending policy.
long_description: Weft is a paid-API marketplace for agents. Search the index for B2B sales contacts, email find/verify, US consumer and real-estate records, Swiss legal documents, image/audio generation and more — then call any endpoint and Weft pays the x402/MPP micropayment from your funded wallet, within the limits you set. This extension connects Claude Desktop to the hosted Weft MCP server (https://weft.network/mcp) over a local bridge and signs you in with OAuth; your wallet keys never leave Weft.

tools.name: weft_search
tools.description: Search the Weft index for paid x402/MPP resources (provider, skills, pricing, ranking).

tools.name: weft_balance
tools.description: Read your Weft wallet balance, promo credit, and spending policy.

tools.name: weft_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL and pay any x402/MPP challenge from your wallet, within your spending policy.

server_url.title: Weft MCP server URL
server_url.description: The hosted Weft MCP endpoint. Leave the default unless you run your own Weft server.
